Martin Nyaga
About Open source

Hi, I'm Martin

I'm a software engineer with over a decade of experience building applications for the web.

I wrote my first line of code in 2010. I've since taken dozens of web apps from conception to production, becoming fluent in a broad range of web technologies along the way.

I've shipped a lot of Ruby, Rails, Javascript, Typescript, and C++. More recently, I've been building with WebAssembly, focusing on how it expands the browser's capabilities. I've been especially interested in porting applications to the browser using WebAssembly. I’m constantly tinkering with new (to me) tech.

I’m currently the Lead Software Engineer at DRS Software, where we build advanced web applications and support organisations in modernising their existing software using Wasm.

GitHub · LinkedIn · dev.to
